subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast borne trials and tribulations in the path of God, and upon whom the winds of tests have blown with intensity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تحمل البلایاء و الرزایاء فی سبیل الله و اشتدت اریاح الامتحان علیه فی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
